title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access it.

title: Checkout Page Freezing
description: Customer reports that the checkout page freezes after clicking the 'Place Order' button.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is not working.

title: Email Address Not Updating
description: Customer updated their email address but the old email is still linked to the account notifications.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Duplicate Payment Charged
description: Customer was charged twice for a single order and requests immediate refund of the extra amount.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number.

title: Dark Mode Not Working
description: Customer enabled dark mode from settings but the interface remains in light mode.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle is disabled.

title: Order Status Not Updating
description: Customer's order has been delivered but the system still shows it as 'Processing'.
